description: Claude persistent memory via iCloud — knowledge graph + deep context archive
user_description: Gives Claude a persistent memory so it remembers your preferences, projects, and past conversations across sessions and devices.
usage_instructions: Memory works automatically once installed. Claude will remember things you tell it between conversations — your preferences, project details, and important context. You don't need to do anything special. If you want Claude to remember something specific, just say "remember this" in conversation.

included_servers.name: Knowledge Graph
included_servers.description: Stores structured facts, people, projects, and relationships as quick-access memory

included_servers.name: Deep Context
included_servers.description: Stores long-form session summaries, creative briefs, and decision logs

user_description: Lets Claude read, create, and manage your Apple Reminders. Claude can add tasks to your lists, check off completed items, and help you stay organized.
usage_instructions: Just ask Claude about your reminders naturally — "What's on my grocery list?", "Add milk to my shopping list", or "Mark the dentist appointment as done." Claude can see all your Reminders lists and manage them for you.

description: iMessage read/send integration via SQLite + AppleScript
user_description: Lets Claude read and send iMessages on your behalf. Claude can check your recent messages, search conversations, and send texts to your contacts.
usage_instructions: Ask Claude things like "What did Mom text me?", "Send a message to John saying I'll be late", or "Search my messages for the restaurant name." Claude can read your message history and send new messages through iMessage.
